mapper.sql: id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, birth_date, gender, bio, is_verified, verification_token, verification_token_expires, social_provider, social_id, password_reset_token, password_reset_expires, failed_login_attempts, locked_until, account_status, suspended_at, suspended_until, suspension_reason, created_at, updated_at, last_login_at, agreed_terms, agreed_privacy, agreed_marketing, terms_agreed_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.users ( id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, birth_date, social_provider, social_id, account_status, agreed_terms, agreed_privacy, agreed_marketing, created_at, failed_login_attempts ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{socialProvider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{socialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountStatus}, #{agreedTerms}, #{agreedPrivacy}, #{agreedMarketing}, #{createdAt}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.users SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.users SET failed_login_attempts = failed_login_attempts + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.users SET failed_login_attempts = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.users SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.users WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND id != #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.users SET nickname = COALESCE(#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname), phone = COALESCE(#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone), profile_image_url = COALESCE(#{profileImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, profile_image_url), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE woorido.users SET nickname = #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, agreed_terms = 'Y', agreed_privacy = 'Y', agreed_marketing = #{agreedMarketing, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, terms_agreed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.users WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.users SET account_status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE woorido.users SET social_provider = #{socialProvider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, social_id = #{socialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE woorido.users SET password_hash = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE woorido.users SET password_reset_token = NULL, password_reset_expires = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenge_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND privilege_status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenge_members cm JOIN woorido.challenges c ON cm.challenge_id = c.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND c.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT NVL(SUM(at2.amount), 0) FROM woorido.account_transactions at2 JOIN woorido.accounts a ON at2.account_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND at2.type IN ('SUPPORT', 'SUPPORT_AUTO')
mapper.update: MERGE INTO woorido.user_scores us USING ( SELECT #{id} AS id, #{userId} AS user_id, #{totalScore} AS total_score, #{calculatedAt} AS calculated_at, #{calculatedMonth} AS calculated_month FROM dual ) src ON (us.user_id = src.user_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET us.total_score = src.total_score, us.calculated_at = src.calculated_at, us.calculated_month = src.calculated_month, us.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( id, user_id, total_score, calculated_at, calculated_month, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( src.id, src.user_id, src.total_score, src.calculated_at, src.calculated_month, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
